creator: martys1oi@att.net
text:
This is a local build.

I've tried building via portmaster -ad in /root and also make install clean in directory /usr/ports/math/vtk9. I am getting the same error for both, which is the same error reported in ticket 267320 10/27/22:

libqmlvtkplugin.so /usr/ports/math/vtk9/work/.build/lib/libvtkFiltersExtraction-9.2.so.1 Undefined Symbol Ompi_mpi_comm_world

I've tried doing make deinstall rmconfig clean, also deleting the vtk9 distfile before the build, but these do not help.
